title: EX5 1BA, Rock Solid Processing Limited: environmental permit issued -EPR/XP3503PF/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Rock Solid Processing Limited   Installation name: Hill Barton IBA   Permit number: EPR/XP3503PF/V003   "
